channel.title: Starro on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Starro on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Advent of Code 2022 and other exciting news you should totally read!
item.description: Advent of Code 2022 is just around the corner, and with it comes new challenges, new technologies, and new ways to have fun programming. Plus, Tactics Ogre: Reborn is almost finished, and Cyberpunk 2077 is waiting for me to dive in. And don't forget about the Gotham Knight Knews update, featuring Starro for four-player coop, and the new GPT-3 language model. And exclusive Guardians of the Galaxy Christmas Special spoilers!
